title: Digvijaya Singh says Jagdambika Pal would be ‘better’ speaker than Om Birla – ‘Kabira khada bazaar mein…’ | Watch Video
description: Congress leader Digvijaya Singh praises BJP MP Jagdambika Pal, suggesting he would be a better Lok Sabha Speaker than Om Birla. Singh's endorsement highlights Pal's ‘fair’ conduct during recent parliamentary proceedings.
